project_goal: Automatically sync new customer leads to Feishu Multi-dimensional tables and send onboarding emails via AI.
target_user: Small business owner running an e-commerce storefront without a dedicated developer team.

input_data.format: JSON payload sent via Webhook callback

actions: Add a row in Feishu Multi-dimensional Table containing customer details.
Send a greeting email via SMTP containing an AI-generated activation code.

integrations.purpose: Generate unique activation keys based on purchase details
Append records to Multi-dimensional Table API

acceptance_tests.metrics: Successful execution rate must be >= 99% for 20 mock test leads

failure_handling.on_api_timeout: Retry 3 times with exponential backoff (initial delay 500ms)
failure_handling.on_persistent_failure: Send alert webhook notification to Slack channel and flag row as failed in database

out_of_scope: No direct management of client Stripe/PayPal merchant accounts.
